calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Salvatore C. Timpano, Esq. of ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER 956-8100, appearing for plaintiff/moving party Diane LeBow

RULING:
No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its Tentative Ruling: PLAINTIFF DIANE LEBOW'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, GRANTED; no opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open Court.

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sal Timpano for plaintiff and moving party: Diane Lebow

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's request for admissions, set #1, are ordered admitted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to plaintiff's form interrogatories set #1 within 15 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
